chat.description: The chat message to submit to Duck.ai

modelId.description: The selected AI model identifier. Optional - if not provided, the backend will use the default model.

images.description: Images to attach to the chat. Optional - maximum 3 images, each up to 5MB. WebP images are converted to PNG.

data.description: Base64-encoded image data (without data URL prefix)

format.description: Image format after processing. Only 'jpeg' or 'png' are sent. JPEG is preserved for .jpg/.jpeg files, all others (including WebP) are converted to PNG.
